activeGoals: Keep cloud DEV and onprem DEV healthy and reproducible on learnplay-stack-dev
Complete podcast/source-content reliability and usability hardening
Promote to ACC/PRD only after explicit DEV validation and operator approval

completedWork.summary: Improved lesson source-content version review, compare diff flow, and actionable feedback behavior.
Stabilized podcast PPTX source behavior, transcript self-heal paths, and active draft continuity through step navigation/autosave.

pendingWork: Unify podcast draft UX so one draft represents the full wizard state instead of step-fragmented labels.
Finalize script editor ergonomics and strict host/guest alternation handling.
Resolve ElevenLabs balance endpoint instability (502) and verify provider-balance refresh behavior.
Ensure PPTX-selected podcast source path never silently falls back to Source DB content.
nextActions: Implement draft-as-unit behavior and verify full step persistence for selected draft.
Enforce PPTX-first source path and explicit extraction failure messaging without hidden fallback.
Fix/validate ElevenLabs balance endpoint and rerun podcast E2E on cloud DEV and onprem DEV.

safetyRules.description: If installer/updater/bootstrap fails on any target, stop and request snapshot restore before retry.
